game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Spiritfarer® is a cozy management game about dying. As ferrymaster to the deceased, build a boat to explore the world, care for your spirit friends, and release them into the afterlife. The Spiritfarer Farewell Edition includes the heartwarming base game and three major content updates.

Free Update Now Available!



Includes the Jackie & Daria Update! This third and final free update for Spiritfarer this year is also its largest. In the Jackie and Daria Update, our heroine Stella sets sail for a new island where she’ll discover a dilapidated hospital and two new spirits: the caretaker Jackie, and Daria, his main patient. Stella’s care and efforts will help soothe a troubled mind and bring the facility back to its former glory. Additionally, the update adds a new platforming event, as well as new upgrades for the ferry.


Free Update Now Available!



The Beverly Update is the second free content update for Spiritfarer, a cozy management game about dying. This update introduces a new passenger and storyline in the diminutive-yet-adorable form of Beverly, the tiny owl spirit. Also included are new buildings for Stella’s boat, new collectible items, and a plethora of Quality of Life improvements inspired by suggestions from the Spiritfarer community. See the Community Hub for full patch notes!


Free Update Now Available!



The Lily Update is the first free content update for Spiritfarer, a cozy management game about dying. A small yet important addition to Spiritfarer’s main game, the Lily Update introduces the new character of Lily the Butterfly Spirit to guide the player through several scenes which add depth and detail to the main character Stella’s story. Additionally, the update brings improvements to the local co-op play and various bug fixes. See the Community Hub for full patch notes!


About the Game

What will you leave behind?


Spiritfarer® is a cozy management game about dying. You play Stella, ferrymaster to the deceased, a Spiritfarer. Build a boat to explore the world, then befriend and care for spirits before finally releasing them into the afterlife. Farm, mine, fish, harvest, cook, and craft your way across mystical seas. Join the adventure as Daffodil the cat, in two-player cooperative play. Spend relaxing quality time with your spirit passengers, create lasting memories, and, ultimately, learn how to say goodbye to your cherished friends. What will you leave behind?

The Spiritfarer® Farewell Edition is the definitive edition of the award-winning cozy management game about dying. It brings together the base game beloved by over 1 million players, and all the additional content released to date. See why critics called Spiritfarer one of the Best Games of 2020.

Features:


  • Enjoy beautiful hand-drawn art and animation.
  • Build, manage, and improve your own ferry.
  • Farm, mine, fish, harvest, cook, weave, craft! An endless variety of activities await you!
  • Meet, take on board, care for, and forge relationships with a cast of memorable characters.
  • Run, jump, and glide your way through elegantly constructed platforming levels.
  • Explore a fantastic and imaginative world. Seek and gather resources to craft upgrades for your ship and gifts for your passengers.
  • Experience moving, emotional stories filled with unforgettable moments.
  • Unwind for hours into cozy and relaxing gameplay. 30 hours to finish, 50+ to experience everything Spiritfarer has to offer.
  • Make the adventure your own with rich customization options for your boat, character, even the cat!
  • Play as Daffodil the cat in optional local co-op. Supports Remote Play Together.
  • Includes the heartwarming base game and three major content updates: explore an expanded world and befriend four new spirit friends!
game_info.description: You are Stella, ferrymaster to the deceased spirits. Navigate your mystical boat across the ethereal seas, collecting spirit passengers and caring for them. Gather resources by fishing and harvesting from floating islands, cook meals to keep spirits happy, and fulfill their final wishes. When a spirit is ready, guide them to the Everdoor to release them into the afterlife. Complete all spirits' journeys to win the game.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Stella left/right, navigate menus
Space: Jump, interact with spirits/islands, fish, harvest
Z: Cook meals at the kitchen (when you have ingredients)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and resource collection mechanics. Verify that Stella can move around the boat, jump to islands, and collect resources through fishing and harvesting.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move Stella left and right across the boat. Jump to reach floating islands when they appear. Interact with fishing spots and harvest points to collect resources. Verify resource counts increase.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Stella successfully moves, jumps, collects fish and plants. Resource inventory updates correctly. No collision issues or movement bugs occur.

TEST_1.expected: Stella successfully moves, jumps, collects fish and plants. Resource inventory updates correctly. No collision issues or movement bugs occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the complete game loop: picking up spirits, fulfilling their needs, and guiding them to the afterlife. This validates the core gameplay loop and win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to spirit pickup locations and collect all spirits. Gather resources consistently. Cook meals when ingredients are available. Feed spirits to increase their happiness. When spirits are ready (happiness maxed), guide them to the Everdoor.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All spirits board the boat, receive care, reach maximum happiness, and are successfully released at the Everdoor. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when all spirits are released.

TEST_2.expected: All spirits board the boat, receive care, reach maximum happiness, and are successfully released at the Everdoor. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when all spirits are released.

TEST_3.test_description: Test efficient resource management and optimal cooking strategy. Verify that the cooking system works correctly and spirits respond to being fed.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Prioritize resource collection early. Cook meals as soon as 2+ ingredients are available. Feed spirits immediately when meals are ready to maximize happiness growth rate.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Resources are collected efficiently. Meals are cooked successfully. Spirit happiness increases when fed. No resource or cooking bugs occur.

TEST_4.test_description: Test navigation and boat positioning mechanics. Verify that the boat moves correctly and Stella can reach all interactive elements.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Use arrow keys to move the boat left and right. Position the boat to align with floating islands and spirit pickup points. Test edge cases near canvas boundaries.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Boat responds smoothly to input. Stella can reach all islands and pickup points. No boundary collision issues. Boat stays within playable area.
